import { Meta } from "@storybook/addon-docs";
import FormioCustomComponent from "./assets/formio custom component.png";
import FormioSettings from "./assets/formioSettings.png";


const layoutProps = {
  
};
const MDXLayout = "wrapper"
function MDXContent({
  components,
  ...props
}) {
  return <MDXLayout {...layoutProps} {...props} components={components} mdxType="MDXLayout">

    <Meta title="Welcome" mdxType="Meta" />
    <h1 {...{
      "id": "queensland-government-formio-custom-component-library"
    }}>{`Queensland Government Form.io custom component library`}</h1>
    <p>{`This repository provides a bundled JS custom component library to form.io builder / form.io renderer / Squiz Matrix form application.`}</p>
    <img src={FormioCustomComponent} alt="share diagram" width="480" />
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "usage"
    }}>{`Usage`}</h2>
    <p>{`You can consume this library either in Form.io Builder or Form.io Renderer.`}</p>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "formio-platform-builder"
    }}>{`Form.io platform builder`}</h3>
    <p>{`To use custom components in the Form.io platform builder, please go to the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://help.form.io/userguide/projects#custom-js-and-css",
        "target": "_blank",
        "rel": "nofollow noopener noreferrer"
      }}>{`Project stage settings`}</a>{` and update the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Custom javascript`}</inlineCode>{` URL with the CDN URL of this library:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`https://static.qgov.net.au/formio-qld/v1/v1.x.x-latest/formio-qld.min.js
`}</code></pre>
    <img src={FormioSettings} alt="share diagram" width="640" />
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "formio-js-renderer-or-builder"
    }}>{`Form.io JS renderer or builder`}</h3>
    <p>{`To use custom components in the Form.io JS renderer, please include the script `}<strong parentName="p">{`AFTER`}</strong>{` the formio script.
Pleaser refer to `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://help.form.io/developers/form-renderer#getting-started",
        "target": "_blank",
        "rel": "nofollow noopener noreferrer"
      }}>{`Form.io doc`}</a>{` for how to initiate your form application in a HTML page.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-html"
      }}>{`<script src="https://unpkg.com/formiojs@latest/dist/formio.full.js"></script>
...
<script src="https://dev-static.qgov.net.au/formio-qld/v1/v1.x.x-latest/formio-qld.min.js"></script>
(This is a temporary URL for POC purpose, actual CDN URL still needs to be
confirmed in production.)
`}</code></pre>
    </MDXLayout>;
}

;
MDXContent.isMDXComponent = true;

export const __page = () => { throw new Error("Docs-only story"); };

__page.parameters = { docsOnly: true };

const componentMeta = { title: 'Welcome', includeStories: ["__page"],  };

const mdxStoryNameToKey = {};

componentMeta.parameters = componentMeta.parameters || {};
componentMeta.parameters.docs = {
  ...(componentMeta.parameters.docs || {}),
  page: () => <AddContext mdxStoryNameToKey={mdxStoryNameToKey} mdxComponentAnnotations={componentMeta}><MDXContent /></AddContext>,
};

export default componentMeta;
