    <Meta title="Helpers/FormioLoader" mdxType="Meta" />
    <h1 {...{
      "id": "formioloader"
    }}>{`FormioLoader`}</h1>
    <p>{`FormioLoader provide function for you to initiate Formio instance.
To use it, simply include the script and run `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`FormioLoader.initFormio()`}</inlineCode>{` in your webpage, it will initiate Formio instance with the div that contains `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`data-formio`}</inlineCode>{` attribute.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-html"
      }}>{`<script src="https://static.qgov.net.au/formio-qld/v1/v1.x.x-latest/formio-loader.min.js"></script>
<script>
  FormioLoader.initFormio();
</script>
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Sample Formio div placeholder:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-jsx"
      }}>{`<div
  id="formio"
  class="qg-forms-v2"
  data-formio
  data-formio-project-name="dev-svcwlpuksmwawwk"
  data-formio-form-name="plsPlusFormDemo"
  data-formio-form-confirmation=""
  data-formio-form-revision=""
  data-formio-env-url="api.forms.platforms.qld.gov.au"
  data-formio-pdf-download="no"
  data-formio-namespace=""
></div>
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Please note that you'll need to include `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`formio.full.js`}</inlineCode>{`/`}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`formio.full.min.js`}</inlineCode>{`, and other necessary formio scripts/libraries before using this script.
You may want to use `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "?path=/docs/helpers-formioscript--page"
      }}>{`FormioScript`}</a>{` to lazy-load all Formio related scripts/libraries.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "initiate-formio-instance"
    }}>{`Initiate Formio instance`}</h2>
    <p>{`To initiate Formio instance, simply include and run the script in your webpage.`}</p>
    <Canvas withSource="open" mdxType="Canvas">
  <Story name="initFormio" parameters={{
        docs: {
          source: {
            code: initFormioCode,
            language: "html"
          }
        }
      }} mdxType="Story">
    {() => {
          setTimeout(() => {
            InitFormio();
          });
          return initFormioTemplate;
        }}
  </Story>
    </Canvas>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "windowinitformiohook"
    }}>{`window.initFormioHook`}</h3>
    <p>{`You could define `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`window.initFormioHook()`}</inlineCode>{` as a hook function for `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`FormioLoader.initFormio()`}</inlineCode>{`.
In other word, you could use it to override the default behavior after the global Formio object loaded and before the form(s) initiated by `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Formio.createForm()`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
    <p>{`This would be useful for modifying prototype functions in the global Formio object.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-jsx"
      }}>{`window.initFormioHook = () => {
  // You could manipulate the global Formio object here, eg:
  const newFunc = Formio.Form.prototype.errorForm.bind({});
  Formio.Form.prototype.errorForm = (err) => {
    // You could customise the err message here
    console.log("err:", err);
    return newFunc(err);
  };
};
FormioLoader.initFormio();
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "alternate-init-method"
    }}>{`Alternate init method`}</h2>
    <p>{`If the script is already loaded, you could init the form with an alternate method `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`FormioLoader.initFormioInstance`}</inlineCode>{`.
This is useful if you want to dynamically inject a form element. (Although the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`FormioLoader.initFormio()`}</inlineCode>{` method will work the same)`}</p>

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "custom-createform-options-with-createformoptions"
    }}>{`Custom createForm options with `}<inlineCode parentName="h2">{`createFormOptions`}</inlineCode></h2>
    <p>{`You can create a hook function `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`createFormOptions`}</inlineCode>{` to customise the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://help.form.io/developers/form-renderer#form-renderer-options",
        "target": "_blank",
        "rel": "nofollow noopener noreferrer"
      }}>{`options`}</a>{`.
Within the function you could pass different options base on different project or form.`}</p>
    <p>{`The example below will add the custom options to every forms in the page.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-jsx"
      }}>{`const customFn = () => {
  return {
    readOnly: true,
  };
};
FormioLoader.initFormioInstance(elem, {
  projectName: "dev-svcwlpuksmwawwk",
  formName: "plsPlusFormDemo",
  envUrl: "api.forms.platforms.qld.gov.au",
  pdfDownload: "no",
  createFormOptions: customFn,
});
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`The example below only add the custom options to certain project or form with a single hook function.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-jsx"
      }}>{`const customFn = ({ envUrl, projectName, formName, defaultOptions, elem }) => {
  if ({ envUrl === "api.forms.platforms.qld.gov.au") {
    return {
      readOnly: true,
    };
  }
  if (projectName === "project1") {
    return {
      readOnly: true,
    };
  }
  if (projectName === "project2" && formName === "form2") {
    return {
      readOnly: true,
    };
  }
  return {};
};
FormioLoader.initFormioInstance(elem1, {
  projectName: "project1",
  formName: "form1",
  envUrl: "api.forms.platforms.qld.gov.au",
  pdfDownload: "no",
  createFormOptions: customFn
});
FormioLoader.initFormioInstance(elem2, {
  projectName: "project2",
  formName: "form2",
  envUrl: "api.forms.platforms.qld.gov.au",
  pdfDownload: "no",
  createFormOptions: customFn
});
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Please refer to `}<a parentName="p" {...{

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "controlling-the-form-with-javascript-with-createformcontroller"
    }}>{`Controlling the Form with JavaScript with `}<inlineCode parentName="h2">{`createFormController`}</inlineCode></h2>
    <p>{`You can create a hook function `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`createFormController`}</inlineCode>{` to customise the `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "https://help.form.io/developers/form-renderer#controlling-the-form-with-javascript",
        "target": "_blank",
        "rel": "nofollow noopener noreferrer"
      }}>{`form controller`}</a>{`.
Within the function you could customise the controller base on different project or form.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-jsx"
      }}>{`const customFn = ({ form }) => {
  form.on("change", (e) => {
    console.info("onChange", e);
  });
};
FormioLoader.initFormioInstance(elem, {
  projectName: "dev-svcwlpuksmwawwk",
  formName: "plsPlusFormDemo",
  envUrl: "api.forms.platforms.qld.gov.au",
  pdfDownload: "no",
  createFormController: customFn,
});
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`The example below only control the form to certain project or form.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-jsx"
      }}>{`const customFn = ({ envUrl, projectName, formName, form, elem }) => {
  if (projectName === "project2" && formName === "form2") {
    form.on("change", (e) => {
      console.info("onChange", e);
    });
  }
};
FormioLoader.initFormioInstance(elem1, {
  projectName: "project1",
  formName: "form1",
  envUrl: "api.forms.platforms.qld.gov.au",
  pdfDownload: "no",
  createFormOptions: customFn,
});
FormioLoader.initFormioInstance(elem2, {
  projectName: "project2",
  formName: "form2",
  envUrl: "api.forms.platforms.qld.gov.au",
  pdfDownload: "no",
  createFormOptions: customFn,
});
`}</code></pre>
