
import React from 'react'
import { mdx } from '@mdx-js/react'

/* @jsxRuntime classic */
/* @jsx mdx */
import { assertIsFn, AddContext } from "@storybook/addon-docs";

import { Canvas, Meta, Story } from "@storybook/addon-docs";
import { SimpleWizard } from "./SimpleWizard";
import { simpleWizardCode } from "./SimpleWizard.code";


const layoutProps = {
  
};
const MDXLayout = "wrapper"
function MDXContent({
  components,
  ...props
}) {
  return <MDXLayout {...layoutProps} {...props} components={components} mdxType="MDXLayout">

    <Meta title="Examples/SimpleWizard" mdxType="Meta" />
    <h1 {...{
      "id": "simple-wizard-example"
    }}>{`Simple wizard example`}</h1>
    <p>{`This example show the default presentation of a wizard form.`}</p>
    <p>{`The demo can be reproduced with `}<a parentName="p" {...{
        "href": "?path=/docs/helpers-formioscript--page"
      }}>{`FormioScript`}</a>{` to lazy-load the Formio library and scripts.`}</p>
    <Canvas withSource="open" mdxType="Canvas">
  <Story name="simpleWizard" parameters={{
        docs: {
          source: {
            code: simpleWizardCode
          }
        }
      }} mdxType="Story">
    {() => SimpleWizard()}
  </Story>
    </Canvas>
    </MDXLayout>;
}

;
MDXContent.isMDXComponent = true;

export const simpleWizard = (() => SimpleWizard());
simpleWizard.storyName = 'simpleWizard';
simpleWizard.parameters = { storySource: { source: '() => SimpleWizard()' }, ...{
  docs: {
    source: {
      code: simpleWizardCode
    }
  }
} };

const componentMeta = { title: 'Examples/SimpleWizard', includeStories: ["simpleWizard"],  };

const mdxStoryNameToKey = {"simpleWizard":"simpleWizard"};

componentMeta.parameters = componentMeta.parameters || {};
componentMeta.parameters.docs = {
  ...(componentMeta.parameters.docs || {}),
  page: () => <AddContext mdxStoryNameToKey={mdxStoryNameToKey} mdxComponentAnnotations={componentMeta}><MDXContent /></AddContext>,
};

export default componentMeta;
