const layoutProps = {

const MDXLayout = "wrapper"
function MDXContent({
  components,

  return <MDXLayout {...layoutProps} {...props} components={components} mdxType="MDXLayout">

    <Meta title="Helpers/FormioScript" mdxType="Meta" />
    <h1 {...{
      "id": "formioscript"
    }}>{`FormioScript`}</h1>
    <p>{`FormioScript provides a shorthand implementation to lazy-load the necessary libraries and scripts to initiate a Formio form in your application.
Simply include it in your application and it will search through the page with Formio div container and initiated the Formio instances.`}</p>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Benefits`}</strong></p>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">{`One script and for all, reduce the chance of missing dependency.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Enforce the scripts are loading in certain order, wrong order will break the application, which is prone to error if insert manually.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Always point to the correct source of scripts.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul">{`Encapsulated, avoid consumer input in case we need to change the composition of scripts.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Before using FormioScript:`}</strong></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-html"
      }}>{`<script
  async="false"
  src="https://static.qgov.net.au/formio-qld/v1/v1.x.x-latest/formio.full.js"
></script>
<script
  async="false"
  src="https://static.qgov.net.au/formio-qld/v1/v1.x.x-latest/premium.min.js"
></script>
<script
  async="false"
  src="https://static.qgov.net.au/formio-qld/v1/v1.x.x-latest/formio-qld.js"
></script>
<link
  href="https://static.qgov.net.au/formio-qld/v1/v1.x.x-latest/formio.full.min.css"
  rel="stylesheet"
/>
<link
  href="https://static.qgov.net.au/formio-qld/v1/v1.x.x-latest/premium.css"
  rel="stylesheet"
/>
<div id="formio1" class="qg-forms-v2"></div>
<div id="formio2" class="qg-forms-v2"></div>
<script>
  Formio.createForm(
    document.getElementById("formio1"),
    "https://api.forms.platforms.qld.gov.au/dev-svcwlpuksmwawwk/plsPlusFormDemo",
    {readOnly: true}
  ).then((form) {
    form.on("change", (e) => {
      console.info("onChange", e);
    });
  });
  Formio.createForm(
    document.getElementById("formio2"),
    "https://api.forms.platforms.qld.gov.au/dev-svcwlpuksmwawwk/testing"
  );
</script>
`}</code></pre>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`After using FormioScript:`}</strong></p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-html"
      }}>{`<div
  class="qg-forms-v2"
  data-formio
  data-formio-project-name="dev-svcwlpuksmwawwk"
  data-formio-form-name="plsPlusFormDemo"
  data-formio-env-url="api.forms.platforms.qld.gov.au"
  data-formio-createForm-options="customFn1"
  data-formio-createForm-controller="customFn2"
  data-formio-createForm-callback="customFn3"
></div>
<div
  class="qg-forms-v2"
  data-formio
  data-formio-project-name="dev-svcwlpuksmwawwk"
  data-formio-form-name="testing"
  data-formio-env-url="api.forms.platforms.qld.gov.au"
></div>
<script>
  window.customFn1 = () => ({
    readOnly: true,
  });
  window.customFn2 = ({ form }) => {
    form.on("change", (e) => {
      console.info("onChange", e);
    });
  };
  window.customFn3 = () => {};
</script>
<script src="https://static.qgov.net.au/formio-qld/v1/v1.x.x-latest/formio-script.min.js"></script>
<script>
  FormioScript.init();
</script>
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`You can replace `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`prod`}</inlineCode>{` in the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`src`}</inlineCode>{` with `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`test`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`staging`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`dev`}</inlineCode>{` / `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`gitbridge`}</inlineCode>{` to load assets from different environments.`}</p>
    <p>{`This script will load the following scripts into the page:`}</p>
    <table>
      <thead parentName="table">
        <tr parentName="thead">
          <th parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Script`}</th>
          <th parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Description`}</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody parentName="table">
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`formio.full.min.js`}</td>

            "align": null
          }}>{`Main Formio library`}</td>

        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null

            "align": null

        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`formio-qld.min.js`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`QG custom component library`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`formio-loader.min.js`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}><a parentName="td" {...{

            }}>{`FormioLoader`}</a>{` helper script`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`formio.full.min.css`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Style for the main Formio library`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`premium.css`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Style for the premium components`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`formio-qld.min.css`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": null
          }}>{`Style for Formio form in Squiz`}</td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "usage-in-squiz-matrix"
    }}>{`Usage in Squiz Matrix`}</h2>
    <p>{`Please refer to Squiz Matrix asset #249261.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "create-form-dynamically"
    }}>{`Create form dynamically`}</h2>
    <p>{`You could create form dynamically after all the scripts are loaded.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-html"
      }}>{`<script src="https://static.qgov.net.au/formio-qld/v1/v1.x.x-latest/formio-script.min.js"></script>
<script>
  FormioScript.init().then(() => {
    const div = document.createElement("div");
    FormioLoader.initFormioInstance(div, {
      projectName: "project1",
      formName: "form1",
      envUrl: "api.forms.platforms.qld.gov.au",
    });
  });
</script>
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`or using `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`FormioLoader.initFormio()`}</inlineCode>{` instead:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-html"
      }}>{`<script src="https://static.qgov.net.au/formio-qld/v1/v1.x.x-latest/formio-script.min.js"></script>
<script>
  FormioScript.init().then(() => {
    const div = document.createElement("div");
    div.innerHtml = \`
    <div
      class="qg-forms-v2"
      data-formio
      data-formio-project-name="project1"
      data-formio-form-name="form1"
      data-formio-env-url="api.forms.platforms.qld.gov.au"
    ></div>
    \`;
    FormioLoader.initFormio();
  });
</script>
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "faqs"
    }}>{`FAQs`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "how-to-pass-custom-createform-options"
    }}>{`How to pass custom createForm options?`}</h3>
    <p>{`You can add `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`data-formio-createForm-options`}</inlineCode>{` in the div's data attribute with the function name you want to return the custom options.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-html"
      }}>{`<div
  class="qg-forms-v2"
  data-formio
  data-formio-project-name="dev-svcwlpuksmwawwk"
  data-formio-form-name="plsPlusFormDemo"
  data-formio-env-url="api.forms.platforms.qld.gov.au"
  data-formio-createForm-options="customFn1"
></div>
<script src="https://static.qgov.net.au/formio-qld/v1/v1.x.x-latest/formio-script.min.js"></script>
<script>
  window.customFn1 = ({
    envUrl,
    projectName,
    formName,
    defaultOptions,
    elem,
  }) => {
    return {
      readOnly: true,
    };
  };
  FormioScript.init();
</script>
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "how-to-customise-createform-form-controller"
    }}>{`How to customise createForm form controller?`}</h3>
    <p>{`You can add `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`data-formio-createForm-controller`}</inlineCode>{` in the div's data attribute with the function name you want to customise the form controller.`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-html"
      }}>{`<div
  class="qg-forms-v2"
  data-formio
  data-formio-project-name="dev-svcwlpuksmwawwk"
  data-formio-form-name="plsPlusFormDemo"
  data-formio-env-url="api.forms.platforms.qld.gov.au"
  data-formio-createForm-controller="customFn2"
></div>
<script src="https://static.qgov.net.au/formio-qld/v1/v1.x.x-latest/formio-script.min.js"></script>
<script>
  window.customFn2 = ({ envUrl, projectName, formName, form, elem }) => {
    form.on("change", (e) => {
      console.info("onChange", e);
    });
  };
  FormioScript.init();
</script>
`}</code></pre>
